title: Spectrum 5-Piece Cordless Garden Tool Kit — Self-Propelled Mower, Hedge Trimmer, Pole Trimmer, Handy Mower & Blower Vac
description_html:
Tackle every garden job from one battery platform. The Spectrum five-piece cordless kit gives you a self-propelled lawnmower, hedge trimmer, pole hedge trimmer, handy mower and blower vacuum — all running on the same SBS cordless system, so a single battery powers your whole garden routine.

What's in the kit

SBS460CLM — Self-Propelled Cordless Lawnmower

A 46cm metal-deck mower built for medium and larger lawns, with a brushless motor and a dual-battery bay for sustained run time. Self-propelled drive takes the effort out of pushing, and four cutting modes (collect, mulch, side discharge or rear discharge) cover every lawn condition. Seven cutting heights from 25–75mm.

SBS560CHT — Cordless Hedge Trimmer

Light in the hand and balanced for control, with clean, precise cuts that keep borders and formal hedges sharp. A practical alternative to petrol when you want quiet, low-vibration trimming you can pick up and use straight away.

SBS240CPHT — Cordless Pole Hedge Trimmer

Reaches up to 2.4m with a 180° adjustable head, so tall hedges and awkward angles can be cut from the ground. The 460mm dual-action, laser-cut blade runs at 2,600 strokes per minute and handles branches up to 20mm thick.

SBS220CHM — Cordless Handy Mower

Compact and manoeuvrable for edges, tight corners and the spots your main mower can't reach. Paired with the SBS460CLM, it gives you a properly finished lawn with no missed strips.

SBS480CBV — Cordless Blower Vacuum

Three jobs in one machine: blow debris off paths, vacuum loose leaves, and shred them down for easier disposal. Ideal for post-mow tidy-ups and autumn clearance.

Why buy the kit

  • One SBS battery platform powers all five tools — buy batteries once, use them everywhere
  • No fuel, no cables, no annual servicing — start work the moment you step outside
  • Backed by Spectrum's 5-year warranty (T&Cs apply)
  • Bundle price saves significantly versus buying each tool individually

Please note: batteries and charger are not included with this kit and are sold separately, so you can match battery capacity to the size of your garden.

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• SBS460CLM self-propelled cordless lawnmower — 46cm metal cutting deck and four cutting modes (collect, mulch, side or rear discharge)
  • SBS560CHT cordless hedge trimmer for clean, precise hedge work
  • SBS240CPHT cordless pole hedge trimmer — 2.4m reach, 180° adjustable head, 20mm cut capacity
  • SBS220CHM cordless handy mower for edges, tight corners and finishing work
  • SBS480CBV cordless blower vacuum — blow, vacuum and mulch in a single tool
  • One SBS battery platform powers every tool in the kit
  • Backed by Spectrum's 5-year warranty (T&C's apply); batteries and charger sold separately
metafields.custom.bullet_two: Five Spectrum cordless tools — mower, hedge trimmer, pole trimmer, handy mower and blower vac — all running on the same SBS battery platform.
metafields.custom.bullet_three: Backed by Spectrum's 5-year warranty (T&C's apply); batteries and charger sold separately so you can match capacity to the size of your garden.
